subcodes.first_line: O Leaf of Love! Thy letter hath been presented before the Throne, and this perspicuous Tablet hath been sent down unto thee. We have hearkened unto what [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ورقه الحب قد حضر کتابک لدی العرش و نزل لک هذا اللوح المبین و سمعنا ما
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
